# Export Route to SBDC International Trade Center

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## Reusable BOSS response pattern When a user wants to export, sell globally, research countries, prepare export financing, or understand trade documentation, route to the SBDC International Trade Center and avoid final legal/customs advice. ## Handoff fields to capture

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns funding, international trade, legal and compliance during Ideation and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
